aboutBoardingHalter: In Renewal, the Boarding Halter is an accessory that grants Riding: when active, your character uses the riding body sprite that belongs to your class (often referred to via client costume/outfit folders). Exact item wording and NPC availability vary by server; pick your class below to see which riding appearance applies when you have Riding.

JT_SUPERNOVICE.note: Super Novice — no standard costume mount.

JT_STAR.note: Taekwon Master — no standard boarding-halter costume mount.

JT_NINJA.note: Ninja — advance to Kagerou/Oboro; no classic halter costume in table.

JT_GUNSLINGER.note: Gunslinger — Rebellion provides the firearm-riding costume.

JT_SWORDMAN.note: Swordman — become Knight/Crusader (or Renewal 3rd) for a riding costume.

JT_MAGICIAN.note: Magician — no mount; advance for job-specific sprites.

JT_ARCHER.note: Archer — no mount; Ranger/Windhawk use the Warg costume.

JT_ACOLYTE.note: Acolyte — no mount; Archbishop/Cardinal use the pedestal/wing costume.

JT_MERCHANT.note: Merchant — no mount; Mechanic uses Madogear, Genetic/Biolo the cart.

JT_THIEF.note: Thief — no mount; assassin GX line uses leopard, Rogue SC line uses cloak mount.

JT_PRIEST.note: Priest — no Riding costume yet; Archbishop/Cardinal use wing pedestal.

JT_WIZARD.note: Wizard — no mount; Warlock/Arch Mage use flight/cloud costume.

JT_BLACKSMITH.note: Blacksmith — no mount; Mechanic/Meister use Madogear.

JT_HUNTER.note: Hunter — no mount; Ranger/Windhawk use Warg.

JT_ASSASSIN.note: Assassin — no mount; Guillotine Cross / Shadow Cross use leopard costume.

JT_MONK.note: Monk — no mount; Sura/Inquisitor use tiger riding costume.

JT_SAGE.note: Sage — no mount; Sorcerer/Elemental Master use elemental ride.

JT_ROGUE.note: Rogue — no mount; Shadow Chaser / Abyss Chaser use cloak rider.

JT_ALCHEMIST.note: Alchemist — no mount; Genetic/Biolo use cart body.

JT_BARD.note: Bard — no mount; Minstrel/Troubadour share performer mount.

JT_DANCER.note: Dancer — no mount; Wanderer/Trouvere share performer mount.

JT_PRIEST_H.note: High Priest — advance to Archbishop for wing pedestal mount.

JT_WIZARD_H.note: High Wizard — advance to Warlock/Arch Mage for flight mount.

JT_BLACKSMITH_H.note: Mastersmith — advance to Mechanic/Meister for Madogear.

JT_HUNTER_H.note: Sniper — advance to Ranger/Windhawk for Warg.

JT_ASSASSIN_H.note: Assassin Cross — advance to GX/Shadow Cross for leopard.

JT_MONK_H.note: Champion — advance to Sura/Inquisitor for tiger mount.

JT_SAGE_H.note: Scholar — advance to Sorcerer/Elemental Master for elemental ride.

JT_ROGUE_H.note: Stalker — advance to Shadow Chaser/Abyss Chaser for cloak mount.

JT_ALCHEMIST_H.note: Biochemist — advance to Genetic/Biolo for cart mount.

JT_BARD_H.note: Clown — advance to Minstrel/Troubadour for performer mount.

JT_DANCER_H.note: Gypsy — advance to Wanderer/Trouvere for performer mount.

JT_SUPERNOVICE2.note: Expanded Super Novice — no standard costume mount.

JT_KAGEROU.note: Kagerou — costume mount varies by client; not in default table.

JT_OBORO.note: Oboro — costume mount varies by client; not in default table.

JT_SHINKIRO.note: Shinkiro (4th ninja) — no entry in costume_1–20 table here.

JT_SHIRANUI.note: Shiranui (4th ninja) — no entry in costume_1–20 table here.

JT_NIGHT_WATCH.note: Night Watch (4th Gunslinger) — no dedicated costume-slot mount in default client list.

JT_HYPER_NOVICE.note: Hyper Novice — no standard costume mount.
